channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 54/100 (building)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 54/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham to spend £700k on helping migrants claim benefits - The Telegraph
item.description: Burnham to spend £700k on helping migrants claim benefits - The Telegraph

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham as prime minister would be beaten by Farage at general election, poll shows
item.description: Burnham as prime minister would be beaten by Farage at general election, poll shows

item.title:
Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: This is very good on the logical preposterousness of the trans bathroom ban. It simply cannot have been the intention of the Equality Act or the governments which administered it.
www.liberalcurrents.com/the-end-of-t...
item.description:
This is very good on the logical preposterousness of the trans bathroom ban. It simply cannot have been the intention of the Equality Act or the governments which administered it.
www.liberalcurrents.com/the-end-of-t...

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: My post from this week on what an Andy Burnham government would look like.
The political team/cabinet. The policy platform. The first six months and the challenge of a very difficult budget.
samf.substack.com/p/what...
item.description:
My post from this week on what an Andy Burnham government would look like.
The political team/cabinet. The policy platform. The first six months and the challenge of a very difficult budget.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Is Andy Burnham Labour’s version of Boris Johnson?
item.description: Is Andy Burnham Labour’s version of Boris Johnson?

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Burnham Battle Gives Glimpse of Future UK Political Instability - Bloomberg.com

item.title: The Guardian: Should Keir Starmer follow Mikel Arteta’s leadership method? | Letters - The Guardian
item.description: Should Keir Starmer follow Mikel Arteta’s leadership method? | Letters - The Guardian

item.title: Sky News Politics: Burnham allies plan cross-party council to stop a Reform UK government
item.description: Burnham allies plan cross-party council to stop a Reform UK government

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer slams Fifa over ‘unacceptable’ World Cup ticket prices as he urges action to stop fans being ‘ripped off’
item.description: Starmer slams Fifa over ‘unacceptable’ World Cup ticket prices as he urges action to stop fans being ‘ripped off’

item.title: The Times: Andy Burnham would rip up asylum hotel contracts if he were PM - The Times
item.description: Andy Burnham would rip up asylum hotel contracts if he were PM - The Times
